text:
Author: rm
Date: Wed Jan  2 22:37:23 2013
New Revision: 309846
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/309846

Log:
  - remove dead python master site
  
  PR:		174914
  Submitted by:	brd

Modified:
  head/Mk/bsd.sites.mk

Modified: head/Mk/bsd.sites.mk
==============================================================================
--- head/Mk/bsd.sites.mk	Wed Jan  2 22:33:53 2013	(r309845)
+++ head/Mk/bsd.sites.mk	Wed Jan  2 22:37:23 2013	(r309846)
@@ -1000,7 +1000,6 @@ MASTER_SITE_PHP+= \
 MASTER_SITE_PYTHON+= \
 	http://www.python.org/%SUBDIR%/ \
 	http://python.ilisys.com.au/%SUBDIR%/ \
-	http://ftp.easynet.be/python/%SUBDIR%/ \
 	http://www.linux.org.hk/mirror/python/%SUBDIR%/ \
 	http://mirrors.sunsite.dk/pythonwww/%SUBDIR%/ \
 	http://python.emdia.fi/%SUBDIR%/ \
